findingDetails.title: Delta validation does not enforce canonical-record parity
findingDetails.evidence: Only numeric iteration identity is compared; delta v2 content is not independently validated before reducer consumption.
findingDetails.recommendation: Enforce canonical field parity or independently validate the delta iteration record.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact validator/test search found only route-proof and iteration-id checks; deep-review reducer loads delta payloads.

claimAdjudication.claim: A contradictory delta canonical record can pass gates and reach reducer input.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched validators and tests for canonical field equality or independent delta validation.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Per-event rows are independent, but the canonical iteration row is contractually shared.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: A mandatory downstream pre-reducer parity gate is demonstrated.

findingDetails.title: Narrative verdict gate accepts a non-final or duplicated verdict
findingDetails.evidence: The unanchored regex accepts any verdict occurrence despite the absolute-final-line and uniqueness contract.
findingDetails.recommendation: Require one exact case-sensitive verdict as the trimmed final line.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact search found the owning contract and sole runtime verifier, with no final-line or uniqueness test.

claimAdjudication.claim: The mechanical gate accepts narratives violating the mandatory verdict contract.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched validators, workflow caller, and tests for final-line or uniqueness enforcement.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Verdict may be re-derived downstream, but malformed artifact acceptance still violates this gate.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: A mandatory earlier gate rejecting non-final or duplicate verdicts is demonstrated.

noveltyJustification: First correctness iteration established two previously unregistered gate defects.
edgeCases: bounded correctness slice; target not saturated
code graph not used; exact search and direct reads used

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Shared runtime gates and reducers affect all deep-review iterations across a 1,217-file target.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Shared correctness boundaries for the three-artifact contract and new divergent mode.

searchLedger.hypothesis: State and delta canonical records can diverge while validation passes.

searchActions.result: Only route proof and numeric iteration identity are compared.
Reducer loads records from every per-iteration delta file.

searchLedger.rationale: Canonical record contradiction is not rejected before structured consumption.

searchLedger.invariant: Exactly one verdict must be the absolute final narrative line.

searchActions.queryOrPath: absolute final line contract and workflow caller
searchActions.result: Owning skill mandates final-line uniqueness and auto workflow invokes verifier.

searchLedger.rationale: Malformed narrative can pass the mechanical reliability gate.

searchLedger.invariant: Pivot completion requires three fulfilled parse-valid seats, material agreement, and no high blocker.

searchActions.queryOrPath: quorum and agreement implementation plus tests
searchActions.result: All invariants are enforced and covered by fail-closed tests.

searchLedger.rationale: Direct source and integration tests agree.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Three-seat quorum and blocker veto are explicit.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Interrupted pivots duplicate durable completion or redispatch completed seats.

searchActions.queryOrPath: event deduplication, resume, and interruption test
searchActions.result: Semantic event-id replay checks and missing-seat filtering prevent duplicate durable seats and outcomes.

searchLedger.rationale: Durable replay is idempotent for tested interruption boundaries.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Event IDs and persisted seat discovery gate redispatch.

title: Delta validation does not enforce canonical-record parity
Narrative verdict gate accepts a non-final or duplicated verdict

direction: Divergent pivot quorum and high-blocker veto
reason: Direct implementation and integration tests enforce fail-closed behavior.
